steps.title: Simplify the given line
steps.content:
Expand the given equation and collect like terms:
$$11(x-n)=11y+11n$$
$$11x-11n=11y+11n$$
$$x-y=2n$$

steps.title: Use the no-solution condition
steps.content: A system of two linear equations has no solution when the lines are parallel but distinct. The second equation must simplify to the same left side, $x-y$, with a different constant.

steps.title: Find the matching choice
steps.content: The equation $3x-3y=3n$ simplifies to $x-y=n$. Since $n$ is positive, $x-y=n$ and $x-y=2n$ are different parallel lines. The answer is D.
